Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltfs' Appearance For Deposition
Off Calendar Mar-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Regents Of The University of California's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs' Appearance For Deposition is granted as to Plaintiffs Lysiane Holland and Robert Holland. No opposition has been filed. Both plaintiffs are ordered to appear for their deposition on a date to be noticed by Defendant and to be completed no later than March 29, 2007. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jan-19-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted it's tentative ruling as follows: ALLAN H. LERCH'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel FOR PLAINTIFFS LYSIANE HOLLAND AND ROBERT HOLLAND IS GRANTED. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189

MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION
Off Calendar Dec-18-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Regents Of The University Of California's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs' Appearance For Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions is ordered off calendar. The notice was insufficient per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. Any motion must be served and filed at least 16 court days prior to the hearing plus five days when the motion is mailed. While the proof of service shows the mailing was timely, the motion was not timely filed as it was filed on November 20, 2006. The first day this motion could have been heard is December 19, 2006. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
